name: Decision Matrix Builder
description: Build a weighted decision matrix to compare options objectively

agents.name: Options Researcher
agents.purpose: Research each option and gather relevant data
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research each option thoroughly. Find pricing, features, reviews, pros/cons. Create a comprehensive comparison dataset.

agents.name: Matrix Builder
agents.purpose: Build a weighted decision matrix with scoring
agents.system_prompt_hint: Build a decision matrix. Define criteria with weights. Score each option 1-5 on each criterion. Calculate weighted totals. Provide a recommendation with reasoning.

author: agentfactory
